offer: For property managers processing 10-20 rental units/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation reports instead of spreadsheets and manual tracking.
problem: Manual reconciliation of rent payments leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try error-checking and dashboard tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
